checkpoint_policy: The full run wrote checkpoints/checkpoints.h5 for restart provenance, but the 385 MB HDF5 payload is omitted from git because golden comparison only requires golden/golden.json and spec.json.

quarantined.reason: pre-FJ-01 invalid nonlinear reference: div_b_l2=0.0267 and div_u_l2=0.0230 both exceed the 1e-2 solenoidality guard, and it was generated with the mis-ordered (streamwise-undealiased) padding. Regression-only evidence; forbidden from seeding or validating production (FJ-01/FJ-03).
